evals.name: release-please-from-scratch
evals.prompt: Set up automated releases for my Go CLI repo from scratch using Release Please and GoReleaser. I want release PRs, tags, GitHub Releases, and release assets after merge.
evals.expected_output: A complete setup plan and file changes that include CI checks, Release Please config files, and a single workflow using the two-job pattern (release-please + goreleaser) with required permissions.
expectations: Uses one workflow file with release-please and goreleaser jobs together
Uses release-please outputs for conditional goreleaser execution
Specifies required workflow permissions: contents: write and pull-requests: write
Explains end-to-end validation flow from feat commit to release assets

evals.name: fix-split-workflows
evals.prompt: My release process is broken: Release Please creates tags/releases but GoReleaser never runs. I currently have release-please.yml and a separate goreleaser.yml triggered on release published. Fix this.
evals.expected_output: An explanation of why separate workflows fail with GITHUB_TOKEN plus a corrected single-workflow two-job pattern that checks out the created tag for goreleaser.
expectations: Explains GitHub Actions workflow-chaining limitation with GITHUB_TOKEN
Moves to single workflow file with both jobs
Uses tag output from release-please for checkout ref
Keeps goreleaser gated by release_created output
Includes required permissions and checkout fetch-depth guidance

evals.name: fix-release-please-permissions
evals.prompt: Release Please fails with a message that it is not permitted to create pull requests. How do I fix repository settings and verify?
evals.expected_output: Correct remediation steps for GitHub Actions workflow permissions, including CLI command and verification guidance.
expectations: Identifies read-only workflow permissions as root cause
Provides gh api command to set default_workflow_permissions=write
Mentions UI path in repository settings for equivalent configuration
Includes simple validation steps after permission change
